industry: Boutique Luxury Real Estate, South Florida
voice: The brand voice is authoritative yet refined, exuding confidence and exclusivity. It speaks with the personalized touch of a dedicated luxury concierge, anticipating client needs.
logo_style_brief: The logo should feature a sophisticated serif monogram incorporating the initials of Sterling & Chase, paired with a clean team wordmark. The primary colors should be black and gold.
photo_style_tokens: warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines

facts_from_brief.Team Context: busy real estate team with Keller Williams in South Florida
facts_from_brief.Designer Role: Canva designer who can keep up with our pace
facts_from_brief.Platform Access: added to our Canva team account and work directly inside it — no outside files or platforms
facts_from_brief.Deliverables Needed: Reels created for Instagram and Facebook covering listings, open houses, and market tips. print mailers and postcards for just listed and just sold campaigns, static social media posts for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, and stories, flyers, and other marketing pieces as needed.
facts_from_brief.Draft Timeline: first drafts within 24 hours of receiving a brief
facts_from_brief.Brand Adherence: strict brand adherence on every design
facts_from_brief.Brand Kit Location: brand kit set up in our Canva that must be followed at all times
facts_from_brief.Quality Expectation: Work should be clean, professional, and ready to post or send to print with minimal back-and-forth
facts_from_brief.Preferred Experience: Experience with real estate or luxury brands is a strong plus
facts_from_brief.Long-Term Potential Criteria: If you're reliable, fast, and consistently on brand, there's long-term potential here

invented: Specific industry detail: Boutique Luxury Real Estate
